meta.title: LexRights — Your digital rights. Enforced.
meta.description: Europe's specialized boutique law firm for digital rights. Platform suspensions, DSA complaints, GDPR damages, consumer protection for digital content. Free first assessment within 24h.

hero.headline: Your digital rights. Enforced.
hero.sub: Suspended, frozen, removed? LexRights is Europe's specialized boutique law firm for digital rights. Free first assessment within 24 hours.

form.success: Thank you — we'll respond within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.consent: By submitting you accept our <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink>.

pillars.title: Four pillars under one roof
pillars.subtitle: We combine platform specialization with European legal expertise. Each pillar with deep, specific content — never generic legal advice.

platforms.title: Platform suspensions
platforms.desc: Account bans on gaming, social, marketplace, payment and crypto platforms. We enforce your reinstatement and damages claims.

dsa.title: DSA & Digital Services
dsa.desc: Complaints under Art. 17, 20, 21 DSA. Statement-of-Reasons analysis, internal complaint handling, referral to certified Out-of-Court Dispute Bodies.

gdpr.title: GDPR & Privacy
gdpr.desc: Data access requests, non-material damages following ECJ C-300/21, right to be forgotten, prohibition of solely automated decisions under Art. 22 GDPR.

consumer.title: Digital consumer rights
consumer.desc: Consumer protection for digital content and services: in-game purchases, streaming, app stores, cloud — under § 327 et seq. BGB / Directive 2019/770.

platforms.title: Specialized for every platform
platforms.subtitle: Dedicated deep-content pages per platform — not one-size-fits-all. We know the ToS, anti-cheat systems, complaint paths and case law.

steps.title: Free first assessment
steps.desc: You describe your case. We assess the chances within 24 hours — at no cost, no commitment.

steps.title: Strategy & fee agreement
steps.desc: On engagement you receive a clear strategic plan and transparent fee agreement — fixed fee where possible.

steps.title: Out-of-court enforcement
steps.desc: GDPR data request, DSA complaint, formal letter to the platform with deadline. Often successful at this stage.

steps.title: Escalation: ADR or court
steps.desc: If needed: referral to Out-of-Court Dispute Body (DSA Art. 21) or interim injunction at consumer's home venue.

items.title: Specialized, not generalist
items.desc: We don't do generic IT law. Every platform, every legal topic with dedicated deep content and experience.

items.title: DSA-native
items.desc: First firm with an explicit workflow for the Digital Services Act. Statement-of-Reasons analysis, ADR referral, damages under Art. 54 DSA.

items.title: EU-wide single source
items.desc: Consumer's home venue under Brussels Ia. We represent you across DACH and the EU in German and English.

items.title: Digital-first
items.desc: Video call, beA, online file. No office visits required. All mandates handled digitally.

items.title: Transparent
items.desc: Clear strategy, clear fee agreement before engagement. Direct billing with legal expenses insurance possible.

items.title: Specialist team
items.desc: PhD platform-law expert with Oxford background + privacy specialist with Tilburg LL.M. — complementary depth.

cta.title: Your account suspended? You have digital rights.
cta.subtitle: We assess your case in 24 hours — free and without commitment.

meta.title: Firm
meta.description: LexRights is a pan-European boutique law firm for digital rights. Specialized in platform suspensions, DSA, GDPR and consumer protection for digital content.

hero.title: A law firm for a new legal reality.
hero.sub: LexRights was founded with a clear mission: give consumers and businesses across Europe access to specialized legal protection in the digital space — at eye level with the major platforms.

items.title: Specialization
items.desc: We don't do generic IT law. Our mandates focus consistently on digital rights: platforms, DSA, GDPR, digital content.

items.title: Depth over breadth
items.desc: Dedicated deep analysis per platform and legal topic. We know the ToS, the anti-cheat systems, the complaint paths and the relevant case law.

items.title: EU-wide single source
items.desc: Consumer's home venue under Brussels Ia. We represent you across DACH and the EU in German and English — no correspondent lawyer surcharge.

items.title: Digital-first
items.desc: Video call, beA, secure online file. Mandates handled fully digitally. No office visits required.

items.title: Transparent
items.desc: Clear fee agreement before engagement. Direct billing with legal-expenses insurance. No hidden costs.

team.title: Our team
team.subtitle: Complementary specialization. Double depth in platform law and data protection.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Contact LexRights — boutique law firm for digital rights. Free first assessment within 24 hours.

hero.title: Let's talk about your case.
hero.sub: Write to us, call, or book an appointment directly. We respond within 24 hours.

office.title: Digital-first practice
office.desc: We handle mandates fully digitally. First consultations by video call or phone, client dashboard, beA for correspondence with platforms and courts. In-person meetings in Berlin by appointment only.

meta.title: Insights
meta.description: Current articles on the DSA, GDPR, platform suspensions and digital consumer rights. In-depth analysis, not boulevard law.

hero.title: Deep analysis of digital rights.
hero.sub: Background on the Digital Services Act, GDPR, BGH and ECJ rulings, platform suspensions — written for clients, not for search engines.

comingSoon.title: Content in preparation
comingSoon.sub: First articles will follow shortly after launch. Topics include 'DSA Art. 17 in practice', 'BGH procedural triad in platform suspensions', 'Vanguard HWID bans and GDPR Art. 22'.

hero.title: Real cases. Real outcomes.
hero.sub: A selection of anonymized case studies from our practice. Values at stake, strategies, outcomes — transparently documented.

comingSoon.title: Case studies in preparation

meta.title: Legal Notice
meta.description: Legal notice / Impressum pursuant to § 5 TMG

imprint.title: Legal Notice
imprint.regulationsBody: These regulations are available at www.brak.de.
imprint.insuranceScopeValue: EU member states, United Kingdom, Switzerland, Norway, Iceland, Liechtenstein.
imprint.vsbgBody: We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board (§ 36 VSBG). For consumer disputes arising from the mandate relationship, the Schlichtungsstelle der Rechtsanwaltschaft (Neue Grünstraße 17, 10179 Berlin, www.schlichtungsstelle-der-rechtsanwaltschaft.de) is competent.
imprint.odrBody: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution:
imprint.liabilityBody: The contents of this website have been created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or topicality of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws (§ 7 (1) TMG).
imprint.linksBody: Our offer contains links to external third-party websites whose content we have no control over. We therefore cannot accept any liability for these external contents.
imprint.copyrightBody: The contents and works on these pages created by the site operators are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution and any kind of use outside the limits of copyright require the written consent of the respective author or creator.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: Information on processing of personal data under GDPR

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy informs you about the processing of personal data when you visit this website and use our contact channels, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the German Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG).

meta.title: Free first assessment
meta.description: Tell us about your case. We assess your chances within 24 hours — free, no commitment.

intro.title: Tell us about your case.
intro.sub: Four short steps. Reply within 24 hours — free and without commitment.

step1.title: What's the issue?
step1.sub: Choose the topic that best describes your case.
step1.platformPlaceholder: e.g. Epic Games, TikTok, PayPal, Steam…

step2.title: What happened?
step2.sub: Briefly describe what the platform told you.
step2.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. 'community guidelines violation', 'suspicious activity', or your own description…

step3.title: Estimated value?
step3.sub: A rough estimate of the value at stake (purchased content, balance, items).

step4.title: Your contact details
step4.sub: So we can get back to you within 24 hours.
step4.messagePlaceholder: Anything else you think is relevant for the assessment.
step4.consent: I consent to the processing of my data for handling this request. Our <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink> applies.

success.title: Thank you!
success.sub: We've received your request. You'll hear from us within 24 hours.
